title: Daejarn Asi
extract:
Daejarn Asi (born 15 August 2000) is a Samoa international rugby league footballer who plays as a scrum-half or stand-off for the Castleford Tigers in the Super League. 
He has previously played for North Queensland Cowboys, New Zealand Warriors and Parramatta Eels in the NRL. He has also played for New Zealand Māori at representative level.
